---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for Infinite
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve.

Example: "It is hard to organize SSH windows when working on many projects at
once because..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this feature and how would they use it?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or anything
else that helps explain the request.
